calendar.matters:
Petition Of Beneficiaries Steven Shain And Carolyn Shain To Surcharge, Suspend And Remove Trustee Allen I. Shain For Breach Of Trust And Conversion; And To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-11-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PTR-13-297117 The Bernard L. Shain Trust and PTR-14-297541 The Bernard L. Shain Revocable Living Trust

Appearances: Michael Freedman for and with Allen Shain. Daniel Leahy for Steven Shain and Carolyn Shain (Beneficiaries).

Mr. Freedman stated that the case did not settle. Mr. Leahy stated that it is premature to set the matter for trial and that he still needs to conduct discovery. The Petition for Settlement of First Account and Report of Trustee, etc. and the Petition of Beneficiaries to Surcharge, Suspend and Remove Trustee, etc. were continued to August 20, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition Of Beneficiaries Steven Shain And Carolyn Shain To Surcharge, Suspend And Remove Trustee Allen I. Shain For Breach Of Trust And Conversion; And To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-04-2014 Continued To Jun-11-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
